assessor_1_raw: Temporal leakage (matter split across 24 months, no chronology), preprocessing leakage (corpus statistics), AUROC metric misaligned (should be Recall@5), BM25 not tuned. Verdict: critique_wins. (Run 1)
assessor_2_raw: Four issues: chronology-less matter split, full-corpus preprocessing, AUROC vs. top-5 metrics, asymmetric tuning. Verdict: critique_wins. (Run 1)
assessor_3_raw: All four planted issues present. Verdict: critique_wins. (Run 1)
